about.bio: Cameron Rumford is a Los Angeles based editor with over 20 years in post-production, specializing in branded content, documentary, and commercial work for some of the world's leading companies.
about.bio2: His work spans the full post-production pipeline — editing, color grading, and audio mixing — with fluency across Adobe Premiere, AVID, and DaVinci Resolve. Recent work includes a Golden and Bronze Telly Award-winning piece for Amazon Web Services. Earlier credits include assistant editor on Undefeated, the 2012 Academy Award winner for Best Documentary.
